# VibeUI

A Vue 3 component library that wraps Bootstrap 5.3. Every Bootstrap component is exposed as a typed Vue component with reactive props, v-model support, automatic Bootstrap JS lifecycle management, and zero manual DOM work required.

**Package:** `@velkymx/vibeui`
**Stack:** Vue 3 (Composition API) + Bootstrap 5.3 + TypeScript + Vite
**Current version:** 1.0.0

---

## Key Mental Model

VibeUI is a thin but complete abstraction layer over Bootstrap. It does three things:

1. **Wraps Bootstrap CSS** ‚Äî components apply the correct Bootstrap classes based on Vue props.
2. **Abstracts Bootstrap JS** ‚Äî interactive components (`Modal`, `Offcanvas`, `Toast`, `Tooltip`, `Popover`, `Accordion`, `Carousel`, `Collapse`, `Dropdown`) initialize, configure, and destroy their own Bootstrap JS instances via `onMounted`/`onBeforeUnmount`. You never touch `new bootstrap.Modal(el)`.
3. **Adds Vue reactivity** ‚Äî props drive Bootstrap re-initialization, `v-model` syncs visibility state, and Bootstrap's native events are re-emitted as Vue events.

---

## Project Structure

```
vibeui/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ src/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.ts                    # Package entry point ‚Äî exports everything
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ types.ts                    # All shared TypeScript types
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ components/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.ts                # Component registration + Vue plugin
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeAlert.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeButton.vue          # Renders as <button>, <a>, or <router-link>; variant="link"
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeBadge.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeButtonGroup.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeCard.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeCloseButton.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeSpinner.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibePlaceholder.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeSkeleton.vue        # v0.9: text/rect/circle/card loading placeholder
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeContainer.vue       # Layout
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeRow.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeCol.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeBreadcrumb.vue      # Data-driven: accepts items[]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeNav.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeNavbar.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeNavbarBrand.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeNavbarToggle.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeNavbarNav.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibePagination.vue      # v-model:currentPage
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeTabContent.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeTabs.vue            # v0.9: tab container w/ content switching
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeTab.vue             # v0.9: child of VibeTabs
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeListGroup.vue       # Data-driven: accepts items[]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeProgress.vue        # Data-driven: accepts bars[]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeStepper.vue         # v0.9: multi-step wizard w/ guards
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeAccordion.vue       # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî auto init/destroy
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeCollapse.vue        # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî v-model
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeDropdown.vue        # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî data-driven items[]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeModal.vue           # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî v-model, Teleport, size xl/fullscreen
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeOffcanvas.vue       # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî v-model, Teleport to body
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeToast.vue           # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî v-model OR no-container mode for host
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeToastHost.vue       # v0.9: hosts queued toasts from useToast()
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeCarousel.vue        # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî v-model:activeIndex
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeTooltip.vue         # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî reactive re-init on prop change
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibePopover.vue         # Bootstrap JS ‚Äî reactive re-init on prop change
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeScrollspy.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeIcon.vue            # Renders Bootstrap Icons (bi-*)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeDataTable.vue       # Generic <T>: sortable, searchable, paginated
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeDatePicker.vue      # v0.9: calendar popover, single + range, keyboard nav
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeAutocomplete.vue    # v0.9: search-as-you-type, sync or async source
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFileInput.vue       # v0.9: file picker w/ drag-drop, accept enforcement
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeSlider.vue          # v0.9: single + range slider, keyboard, track click
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeResizable.vue       # v0.9: corner / edge handle resizing
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeSortable.vue        # v0.9: drag-to-reorder list (single-list)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeDraggable.vue       # v0.9: free-drag source, pairs with VibeDroppable
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeDroppable.vue       # v0.9: drop zone, group / acceptGroups matching
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ dndStore.ts             # v0.9: shared payload store between drag/drop
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormInput.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormSelect.vue      # v0.9: typed primitive option values
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormTextarea.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormCheckbox.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormRadio.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormSwitch.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormSpinbutton.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormDatepicker.vue  # Native <input type=date> wrapper
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormGroup.vue       # Context-aware ‚Äî auto-links label to child input
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeInputGroup.vue      # prepend/append slots; pairs with noWrapper inputs
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeLink.vue
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeFormWysiwyg.vue     # Quill 2.x ‚Äî toolbar string presets in v0.9
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeChartLine.vue       # v1.0: canvas line chart, smooth/fill, Bootstrap color cycling
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeChartBar.vue        # v1.0: canvas bar chart, grouped + stacked
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ VibeChartPie.vue        # v1.0: canvas pie chart, Bootstrap color cycling
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ composables/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useId.ts                # Generates unique IDs (SSR-safe)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useColorMode.ts         # Bootstrap color mode management (singleton)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useFormValidation.ts    # Field-level validation + built-in validators
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useForm.ts              # v0.9: multi-field form state w/ deep-clone reset
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useToast.ts             # v0.9: global toast service (use w/ <VibeToastHost />)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ usePosition.ts          # v0.9: floating-ui anchor positioning
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useBackButton.ts        # v0.8: Android hardware back button
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ useBreakpoints.ts       # v0.8: programmatic breakpoint detection
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ directives/
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ vTooltip.ts             # v0.9: v-vibe-tooltip directive
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ tests/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ components/                 # Component tests (Vitest + @vue/test-utils)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ composables/                # Composable tests
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ directives/                 # Directive tests
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ mocks/bootstrap.ts          # Aliased in vite.config.ts test block
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ docs/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ README.md                   # Docs index ‚Äî start here
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ components/                 # Per-component reference docs
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ forms/                      # Form + validation docs
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ directives/                 # v-vibe-tooltip
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ utilities/position.md       # Bootstrap position-* class reference
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ composables/
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ color-mode.md
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ breakpoints.md
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ back-button.md
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-form.md
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ use-position.md
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ use-toast.md
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ examples/                       # Standalone HTML files (CDN-based, no build needed)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ smoke/                          # v0.9: manual smoke test page
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.html                  # `npm run smoke` builds + serves on :8001
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ dist/                       # gitignored; populated by `npm run smoke`
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ vite.config.ts                  # Also contains Vitest config
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ llms.txt                        # This file
```

---

## Installation & Setup

```bash
npm install @velkymx/vibeui bootstrap
```

```ts
// main.ts
import { createApp } from 'vue'
import VibeUI, { useColorMode } from '@velkymx/vibeui'
import 'bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css'
import App from './App.vue'

// Restore saved light/dark/auto preference before first render
const { initColorMode } = useColorMode()
initColorMode()

createApp(App).use(VibeUI).mount('#app')
```

Bootstrap CSS must be imported by the consumer. VibeUI does **not** bundle it.
Bootstrap JS is handled internally via dynamic import ‚Äî do **not** import `bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js` yourself.

---

## Exports

Everything is exported from the package root:

```ts
// Plugin (registers all components + the v-vibe-tooltip directive)
import VibeUI from '@velkymx/vibeui'
app.use(VibeUI)

// Individual components
import {
  VibeButton, VibeAlert, VibeModal, VibeOffcanvas,
  VibeFileInput, VibeSkeleton, VibeDatePicker, VibeAutocomplete,
  VibeTabs, VibeTab, VibeStepper,
  VibeSortable, VibeDraggable, VibeDroppable,
  VibeResizable, VibeSlider,
  VibeToast, VibeToastHost,
  VibeChartLine, VibeChartBar, VibeChartPie
  /* ... */
} from '@velkymx/vibeui'

// Composables
import {
  useColorMode, useFormValidation, validators,
  useId, useBreakpoints, useBackButton,
  useForm, useToast, usePosition, resetToastStoreForSSR
} from '@velkymx/vibeui'

// Directives (also registered globally by app.use(VibeUI))
import { vTooltip } from '@velkymx/vibeui'

// Types
import type {
  Variant, ButtonVariant, ColorMode, Size,
  DataTableColumn, DataTableCellSlotProps,
  FormSelectOption, FormSelectOptionValue,
  ToastSpec, ToastShowOptions, UseToastReturn,
  UsePositionOptions, UsePositionReturn,
  ChartData, ChartDataset, ChartLegendPosition
} from '@velkymx/vibeui'
```

---

## Shared Types (`src/types.ts`)

These types are used across all components. Always import from `@velkymx/vibeui`.

```ts
type Variant         = 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'success' | 'danger' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'light' | 'dark'
type ButtonVariant   = Variant | 'link'                              // v0.9
type Size            = 'sm' | 'lg'
type ColorMode       = 'light' | 'dark' | 'auto'
type ButtonType      = 'button' | 'submit' | 'reset'
type Tag             = 'div' | 'span' | 'section' | 'article' | 'nav' | 'aside' | 'header' | 'footer' | 'main'
type Placement       = 'top' | 'bottom' | 'start' | 'end'
type ToastPlacement  = 'top-start' | 'top-center' | 'top-end' | 'middle-...' | 'bottom-...'
type Direction       = 'up' | 'down' | 'start' | 'end'
type SpinnerType     = 'border' | 'grow'
type InputType       = 'text' | 'email' | 'password' | 'number' | 'tel' | 'url' | 'search' | 'date' | 'time' | ...
type ValidationState = 'valid' | 'invalid' | null

// Data-driven component item shapes
interface BreadcrumbItem   { text, href?, to?, active? }
interface NavItem          { text, href?, to?, target?, active?, disabled?, children? }
//   target?: string ‚Äî tab panel selector (e.g. '#panel-id') for tabs/pills mode with router-link items
interface DropdownItem     { text?, href?, to?, active?, disabled?, divider?, header? }
interface ListGroupItem    { text, href?, to?, active?, disabled?, variant? }
interface AccordionItem    { id, title, content, show? }
interface CarouselItem     { src, alt?, caption?, captionText?, active?, interval? }
interface ProgressBar      { value, max?, variant?, striped?, animated?, label?, showValue? }

// Generic over the row type T (default Record<string, unknown>) ‚Äî v0.9
interface DataTableColumn<T>      { key: keyof T & string, label, sortable?, searchable?,
                                    formatter?: (value: T[keyof T], row: T) => string | number, ... }
interface DataTableCellSlotProps<T> { item: T, value: T[keyof T], index: number }

// Form select primitive ‚Äî accepts null / undefined / boolean (v0.9)
type FormSelectOptionValue = string | number | boolean | null | undefined
interface FormSelectOption  { value: FormSelectOptionValue, text, disabled? }

// v1.0 charts
interface ChartDataset      { label: string, data: number[], color?: string }
interface ChartData         { labels: string[], datasets: ChartDataset[] }
type ChartLegendPosition    = 'top' | 'bottom' | 'none'

// v0.9 stepper / toast / position
interface StepperStep       { label, description?, disabled?, icon? }
interface ToastSpec         { id, title?, body, variant?, placement?, autohide?, delay? }
interface ToastShowOptions  { id?, title?, variant?, placement?, autohide?, delay? }
interface UsePositionOptions { my?, at?, offset?, collision?, autoUpdate?, strategy? }
```

---

## Layout Components

### VibeContainer

Wraps Bootstrap's `.container`, `.container-fluid`, and `.container-{breakpoint}`.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `fluid` | `boolean \| ContainerType` | `false` | `false` = fixed, `true` = fluid, or breakpoint string |
| `tag` | `Tag` | `'div'` | HTML element |

```vue
<VibeContainer>Fixed width</VibeContainer>
<VibeContainer fluid>Full width</VibeContainer>
<VibeContainer fluid="md">Fluid until md breakpoint</VibeContainer>
```

### VibeRow

Bootstrap grid row with gutters, row-columns, and alignment.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `tag` | `Tag` | `'div'` | HTML element |
| `gutters` | `GutterSize` | ‚Äî | Both-axis gutter (`0`-`5`) |
| `guttersX` / `guttersY` | `GutterSize` | ‚Äî | Per-axis gutter |
| `gutters{X\|Y}{Sm\|Md\|Lg\|Xl\|Xxl}` | `GutterSize` | ‚Äî | Responsive gutters |
| `rowCols` | `RowColsSize` | ‚Äî | Columns per row (`1`-`6`) |
| `rowCols{Sm\|Md\|Lg\|Xl\|Xxl}` | `RowColsSize` | ‚Äî | Responsive row-cols |
| `alignItems` | `AlignItems` | ‚Äî | Vertical alignment |
| `justifyContent` | `JustifyContent` | ‚Äî | Horizontal distribution |

Types: `GutterSize = 0-5`, `RowColsSize = 1-6`, `AlignItems = 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'baseline' | 'stretch'`, `JustifyContent = 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'around' | 'between' | 'evenly'`

### VibeCol

Bootstrap grid column with responsive sizing, offsets, ordering, and alignment.

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `tag` | `Tag` | `'div'` | HTML element |
| `cols` | `ColSize \| boolean` | ‚Äî | Base width (`1`-`12`, `'auto'`, or `true`) |
| `sm` / `md` / `lg` / `xl` / `xxl` | `ColSize \| boolean` | ‚Äî | Responsive width |
| `offset` | `Number` | ‚Äî | Base offset (`0`-`11`) |
| `offset{Sm\|Md\|Lg\|Xl\|Xxl}` | `Number` | ‚Äî | Responsive offsets |
| `order` | `OrderValue` | ‚Äî | Visual order |
| `order{Sm\|Md\|Lg\|Xl\|Xxl}` | `OrderValue` | ‚Äî | Responsive order |
| `alignSelf` | `AlignItems` | ‚Äî | Individual vertical alignment |

Types: `ColSize = 1-12 | 'auto'`, `OrderValue = 0-5 | 'first' | 'last'`

When no sizing props are provided, `VibeCol` defaults to equal-width (`col` class).

```vue
<VibeContainer>
  <VibeRow :gutters="3">
    <VibeCol :cols="12" :md="6" :lg="4">Responsive</VibeCol>
    <VibeCol :cols="12" :md="6" :lg="4">Responsive</VibeCol>
    <VibeCol :cols="12" :md="12" :lg="4">Responsive</VibeCol>
  </VibeRow>
</VibeContainer>
```

---

## Core Patterns

### v-model for visibility

All interactive components (Modal, Offcanvas, Toast, Collapse, Alert) use `v-model` to control open/closed state:

```vue
<script setup>
const show = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
  <VibeButton @click="show = true">Open</VibeButton>
  <VibeModal v-model="show" title="Hello">Content</VibeModal>
</template>
```

### Data-driven components

Components like `VibeBreadcrumb`, `VibeListGroup`, `VibeDropdown`, `VibeAccordion`, `VibeCarousel`, and `VibeProgress` accept an `items` or `bars` array prop rather than manual slot markup:

```vue
<VibeBreadcrumb :items="[
  { text: 'Home', href: '/' },
  { text: 'Products', href: '/products' },
  { text: 'Details', active: true }
]" />
```

### VibeFormGroup ‚Äî automatic label linking

`VibeFormGroup` uses Vue's `provide`/`inject` to share a generated ID with child inputs. This means `id` and `label-for` are optional ‚Äî the group handles accessibility automatically:

```vue
<VibeFormGroup label="Email Address">
  <VibeFormInput v-model="email" type="email" />
  <!-- label is automatically linked to input, no id needed -->
</VibeFormGroup>
```

### Accessing the Bootstrap instance

Every interactive component exposes its Bootstrap instance via a template ref:

```vue
<template>
  <VibeModal ref="modal" v-model="show" title="Advanced" />
</template>

<script setup>
const modal = useTemplateRef('modal')
// modal.value.bsInstance ‚Üí native Bootstrap Modal instance
</script>
```

### Teleportation

`VibeModal`, `VibeOffcanvas`, and `VibeToast` render via `<Teleport to="body">` by default. This prevents CSS stacking context issues. No configuration needed.

### Toast service (v0.9)

Mount `<VibeToastHost />` once at the app root, then dispatch from anywhere via the `useToast` composable. Toasts at the same placement stack inside one shared `.toast-container`.

```vue
<!-- App.vue -->
<template>
  <RouterView />
  <VibeToastHost />
</template>
```

```ts
import { useToast } from '@velkymx/vibeui'
const toast = useToast()
toast.success('Saved')
toast.error('Network error', { delay: 8000 })
const sticky = toast.warn('Long export‚Ä¶', { autohide: false })
toast.dismiss(sticky.id)
```

The component-form `<VibeToast v-model="show">` still works for app-local toasts.

### Drag & drop (v0.9)

Two layers depending on use case:

- **Single-list reorder** ‚Üí `<VibeSortable v-model="items">` with a scoped slot per item.
- **Cross-list moves** (kanban, builders) ‚Üí `<VibeDraggable :payload>` paired with `<VibeDroppable @drop>`. Match by `group` (default `'default'`) or `acceptGroups` whitelist. Payloads pass through a shared module store, so they can be typed objects, refs, or non-serializable values ‚Äî no DataTransfer string round-trip.

A document-level `dragend` / `drop` listener installed by `setActiveDrag` clears stale payloads if a drag aborts (escape, page nav, browser bug).

### Calendar popover (v0.9)

`VibeDatePicker` is a fully custom calendar (distinct from `VibeFormDatepicker` which wraps `<input type=date>`). ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` model, `range` mode emits `[start, end]`, full keyboard nav (arrows / PageUp+Down / Home+End / Enter / Escape), click-outside-to-close.

```vue
<VibeDatePicker v-model="due" :min="'2026-01-01'" :max="'2026-12-31'" />
<VibeDatePicker v-model="window" range />
```

### Floating UI anchoring (v0.9)

For ad-hoc anchoring when CSS position utilities aren't enough. Wraps `@floating-ui/dom` with a natural-language anchor-point API.

```ts
const { x, y, placement, update, stop } = usePosition(targetRef, anchorRef, () => ({
  my: 'top center',
  at: 'bottom center',
  offset: [0, 8],
  collision: 'flip+shift'
}))
```

Pass options as a getter to keep `my` / `at` reactive.

---

## Composables

### useColorMode

Singleton. Sets `data-bs-theme` on `<html>`. Persists to `localStorage`.

```ts
const { colorMode, setColorMode, toggleColorMode, initColorMode } = useColorMode()

// colorMode: Ref<'light' | 'dark' | 'auto'>
// Call initColorMode() once in main.ts ‚Äî subsequent calls are no-ops
// toggleColorMode() cycles light ‚Üí dark ‚Üí auto ‚Üí light
```

Full docs: `docs/composables/color-mode.md`

### useFormValidation

Per-field validation with reactive state.

```ts
const email = useFormValidation('')

// email.value          ‚Äî Ref<string>
// email.validationState ‚Äî Ref<'valid' | 'invalid' | null>
// email.validationMessage ‚Äî Ref<string>
// email.isValid / email.isInvalid ‚Äî computed booleans
// email.isDirty / email.isTouched / email.isValidating ‚Äî Ref<boolean>
// await email.validate(rules)
// email.reset()
```

### validators (built-in)

```ts
import { validators } from '@velkymx/vibeui'

validators.required(message?)
validators.email(message?)
validators.minLength(n, message?)
validators.maxLength(n, message?)
validators.min(n, message?)
validators.max(n, message?)
validators.pattern(regex, message?)
validators.url(message?)
validators.async(fn: (value) => Promise<boolean | string>)
```

Validators return `true` on pass, or a string error message on failure.
Full docs: `docs/forms/validation.md`

### useId

Generates a unique, SSR-safe ID string. Used internally by form components.

```ts
const id = useId('prefix') // ‚Üí 'prefix-3-7'
```

### useForm (v0.9)

Multi-field form state with reactive `fields`, `errors`, `touched` maps. `fields` is a Vue `reactive` so its properties auto-unwrap in templates.

```ts
const { fields, errors, touched, isDirty, isValid, validate, validateField, reset, markAllTouched, setField, values }
  = useForm({ name: '', email: '', age: 0 })

const result = await validate({
  name:  [validators.required('Name is required')],
  email: [validators.required(), validators.email()],
  age:   [validators.min(18, 'Must be 18+')]
})
// result.valid: boolean
// result.errors: Partial<Record<K, string>>
```

`reset` deep-clones the initial values back in (works for object / array fields). Dirty tracking uses structural compare (`JSON.stringify`) so non-primitive fields don't read as permanently dirty.

For **single-field** validation, prefer `useFormValidation` (older API) and destructure at the call site to keep templates clean.

### useToast (v0.9)

```ts
const { show, success, error, warn, info, dismiss, clear, toasts } = useToast()

success(body, { id?, title?, placement?, autohide?, delay? })
toasts // DeepReadonly<ToastSpec[]>
```

The store is a module singleton (per app per JS realm). For SSR, call `resetToastStoreForSSR()` from the server entry's per-request reset hook. Multi-app browser usage shares the same queue ‚Äî use the component form for app-local notifications.

### usePosition (v0.9)

```ts
const { x, y, placement, update, stop } = usePosition(target, anchor, options)
```

`options` accepts a plain object (static) **or** a getter `() => UsePositionOptions` (reactive). The getter is re-evaluated on every `update()` and is part of the watch dependency set.

The composable owns `position` / `left` / `top` on the target element while alive. `stop()` (and `onBeforeUnmount`) restore the previous inline values.

### useBreakpoints (v0.8)

```ts
const { isXs, isSm, isMd, isLg, isXl, isXxl, isMobile, isTablet } = useBreakpoints()
```

Reactive booleans driven by `window.matchMedia` against Bootstrap's standard breakpoints.

### useBackButton (v0.8)

Hooks Android's hardware back button (Capacitor / Cordova) into Vue components ‚Äî `VibeModal` and `VibeOffcanvas` register their close handlers automatically.

---

## Directives

### v-vibe-tooltip (v0.9)

Inline tooltip directive registered globally by `app.use(VibeUI)`.

```vue
<button v-vibe-tooltip="'Save changes'">Save</button>
<span v-vibe-tooltip="{ title: 'Open in new tab', placement: 'right', html: true }">‚Üó</span>
```

Re-creates the underlying Bootstrap Tooltip when `placement` / `trigger` / `html` change; title-only changes use the cheap `setContent` path. Touch devices auto-swap `hover focus` ‚Üí `click`.

For component-form usage with rich slot content, use `<VibeTooltip>`.

---

## Testing

**Stack:** Vitest + @vue/test-utils + happy-dom

**Run tests:**
```bash
npx vitest run         # single run
npx vitest             # watch mode
npx vitest --coverage  # coverage report
```

**Bootstrap JS is mocked** in tests. The mock lives at `tests/mocks/bootstrap.ts` and is aliased in `vite.config.ts`. Component tests never trigger real Bootstrap JS initialization.

**Pattern for component tests:**
```ts
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'
import { mount } from '@vue/test-utils'
import VibeButton from '../../src/components/VibeButton.vue'

it('applies variant class', () => {
  const wrapper = mount(VibeButton, { props: { variant: 'danger' } })
  expect(wrapper.classes()).toContain('btn-danger')
})
```

**Pattern for composable tests:**
- Use `_resetColorMode()` (exported from `useColorMode.ts`, not from the package index) to reset singleton state between tests.
- Use `vi.stubGlobal` + `try/finally` for environment mocking (e.g. SSR simulation).

---

## Build

```bash
npm run build   # outputs to dist/ as ESM + UMD + type declarations
npm run dev     # Vite dev server for the src/App.vue playground
```

Build output:
- `dist/vibeui.es.js` ‚Äî ESM for bundlers
- `dist/vibeui.umd.js` ‚Äî UMD for CDN / script tag usage
- `dist/vibeui.d.ts` ‚Äî TypeScript declarations

Vue and Bootstrap are **external** ‚Äî not bundled. Consumers provide their own. `@floating-ui/dom` is a runtime dependency (used by `usePosition`).

### Smoke testing

```bash
npm run smoke   # rebuilds the lib + serves smoke/ on :8001
```

`smoke/index.html` mounts every component with realistic data and a status badge for runtime errors. Bootstrap, Quill, and Vue are loaded from CDN via an importmap (Bootstrap and Quill via `esm.sh` so transitive deps like `@popperjs/core` resolve automatically).

---

## Adding a New Component

1. Create `src/components/VibeFoo.vue`
2. Follow the pattern: `defineProps` with typed props, `computed` for class assembly, `<component :is="tag">` if the element type is configurable
3. Export from `src/components/index.ts` (named export + `app.component(...)` registration)
4. Export from `src/index.ts` (re-export via `export * from './components'` covers it automatically)
5. Add types to `src/types.ts` if new shared types are needed
6. Add tests in `tests/components/VibeFoo.test.ts`
7. Add docs in `docs/components/{category}/foo.md`

If the component uses Bootstrap JS:
- Dynamically import: `const { Foo } = await import('bootstrap')`
- Initialize in `onMounted`, dispose in `onBeforeUnmount`
- Watch functional props and call `instance.dispose()` + reinitialize on change
- Expose `bsInstance` via `defineExpose`

---

## Canvas Charts (v1.0)

Three chart components drawn directly on `<canvas>` ‚Äî no Chart.js or other dependency.

```vue
<VibeChartLine :data="data" smooth fill legend="top" />
<VibeChartBar  :data="data" stacked />
<VibeChartPie  :data="data" />
```

All three share the same `ChartData` shape:

```ts
const data: ChartData = {
  labels: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'],
  datasets: [
    { label: 'Revenue', data: [100, 150, 130], color: '#0d6efd' }  // color optional
  ]
}
```

When `color` is omitted, colors cycle through Bootstrap CSS variables (`--bs-primary`, `--bs-success`, `--bs-danger`, ...) from the component's computed style ‚Äî automatically matching your Bootstrap theme and dark mode.

| Prop | Line | Bar | Pie | Description |
|------|------|-----|-----|-------------|
| `data` | ‚úì | ‚úì | ‚úì | `ChartData` ‚Äî required |
| `legend` | ‚úì | ‚úì | ‚úì | `'top' \| 'bottom' \| 'none'` (default `'bottom'`) |
| `height` | ‚úì | ‚úì | ‚úì | Number/String px or `'auto'` (default). Line/Bar ‚Üí 16:9, Pie ‚Üí 1:1 |
| `showAxes` | ‚úì | ‚úì | ‚Äî | Show X/Y axes (default `true`) |
| `showGrid` | ‚úì | ‚úì | ‚Äî | Show grid lines (default `true`) |
| `smooth` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Bezier curves instead of straight lines |
| `fill` | ‚úì | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Fill area under line |
| `stacked` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | ‚Äî | Stack datasets instead of grouping |

All charts are responsive via `ResizeObserver`, render at device pixel ratio for crisp HiDPI output, and show hover tooltips on data points/slices/bars.

---

## What VibeUI Does NOT Do

- Does not bundle Bootstrap CSS or JS
- Does not require Bootstrap Icons (optional peer dep for `VibeIcon`)
- Does not require Vue Router (optional peer dep for `href`/`to` props on `VibeButton`)
- Does not require QuillJS (optional peer dep for `VibeFormWysiwyg`)
- Does not provide a theme system beyond Bootstrap's `data-bs-theme` color modes
